title: Fed’s Collins Says Rates Likely on Hold ‘For Some Time’
description: Federal Reserve Bank of Boston President Susan Collins said interest rates are likely to stay unchanged “for some time” as recent economic data shows an improvement in the labor market, while risks to inflation remain.
content: Federal Reserve Bank of Boston President Susan Collins said interest rates are likely to stay unchanged “for some time” as recent economic data shows an improvement in the labor market, while risks to inflation remain.
